title: seriphidium subsalsum
intro: Seriphidium subsalsum, also known as Chinese wormwood or Mongolian wormwood, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Seriphidium subsalsum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve menstrual cramps.
